titleStmt.title: SII 26.213: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 213.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the gōpura of the same temple.

p.hi: Kṛishṇarāja-Vaḍeya of Mahisūru ruling at Śrīraṅgapaṭṭana. Ś. 1678, Kaḷi 4857, Dhātṛi = 1756 A.D.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records that Śaṅkarayya, son of Madanayya and grandson of Mādayya who is the son of Vīrayya and an officer (gurikāra) at Coimbatore and a kāryakarta of daḷavāyi Dēvarājayya, an agent of the king in this part of the country, is stated to have carried out the renovation of the temples at Aviṇaśi including the maṇḍapas, the gōpuras, the prākāra walls, the paved flooring (nelakaṭṭu) and the tank for the floating festival (teppakoḷa). He is also stated to have set up a Pañchaliṅga called Śaṁkarēśvara in the south-east corner of the prākāra of Aviṇaśīśvira temple here. Also it registers a grant of land made after purchase, to the above deity for the maintenance of lamp and worship. The details of grant land are not given in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakābda 1678 śalyabdā 4857 saṁḍavarta mānavāda
dhātunāpusaṁvatsarada phālguṇa śu 7 rallū śrī madrājādhirājarāja paramēśvara prauḍhapratāpa Āpratima vīranara pa
ti mahiśūra Āḷida mahāsvāmiya varāda kṛṣṇarāja voḍeyareyya navaru śrīraṁgapaṭṭaṇadallū ratnasiṁ
hvāsanārūḍharāgi pṛthvī sāṁmrājyaṁgeyyuttiralu Avarakā¨rya(kka) ka¨rtarāda mahārāja śrī daḷavāI
dēvarājayya navara kā¨rya(kka)ka¨rtarāda kōyaṁmuttūriguri kārru tarakaṇāṁbistaḷada naḷaṁra vīrayya na maganiṁ
da mādayya navara pautrarāda madanayya navara putrarāda śaṁkarayya navaru dakṣiṇa kāśi Aviṇaśi kṣētragaḷalli
paḍayīvubhaya mahādēvastānagaḷu gāreguccu Illade badra Anādi jī¨rṇavāgi Iddida rādayya vubhaya dēva
stānadallū Iruva sakalavāda maṁṭapa gōpura prākāra nelakaṭṭa tappakoḷa muṁtāgi kellu gelasagāri kelasagaḷiṁ
da bhadravāgi jī¨rṇōddāramāḍi śrī Aviṇa śiśvirasvāmiyavara dēvasthānada baḷa prākārada Āgnēya bhāgadallū
paṁcaliṁgada sāline baḍagalāgināvu nūtanavāgi pratiṣṭamāḍide Iruva śrī śaṁkarēśvara svāmi yavara paḍitara dīpārādane
sēve śāśvatavāgi naḍedu baruva bagge namma kayyiṁda haṇavakoṭṭu śrayakkekoṁḍu voppinta holagadde vivara
Digital edition of SII 26.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
